bead.title: bead-lifecycle: spec forward-progress readiness policy in FEAT-010 and ADR-023
bead.description:
PROBLEM
FEAT-010 and ADR-023 underspecify when readiness may move work to status=proposed. ADR-023 defaults lifecycle quality to WARN-ONLY, but FEAT-010 still permits downgrade for ambiguous or underspecified content. The boundary between an observable readiness warning and a hard operator-decision escape is not written down, which lets readiness recreate a proposed->open->proposed loop after an operator has already accepted the bead.

ROOT CAUSE
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md:219-224 permits status=proposed for ambiguous readiness outcomes without distinguishing operator-promoted beads.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md:485-493 documents readiness terminal handling without naming the open-as-execution-lane invariant.
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-023-bead-lifecycle-quality-policy.md:85-99 declares WARN-ONLY default but does not codify the proposed->open operator-acceptance signal or forbid re-downgrade.

PROPOSED FIX
Update FEAT-010 and ADR-023 to define the forward-progress readiness policy: (a) open is the execution lane; (b) proposed is the hard operator-decision escape; (c) operator-driven proposed->open is a durable acceptance signal that readiness must honor; (d) readiness warnings are observable but non-blocking by default. Cross-link the two docs and add an explicit non-regression clause: readiness must not move an operator-promoted bead back to proposed.

NON-SCOPE
- Code changes in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go (covered by sibling implementation bead).
- intake.blocked payload shape changes (covered by sibling observability bead).
- Fizeau concrete route selection, model ranking, provider fallback, or profile catalog behavior.
- Rewriting execute-bead branch merge policy.
- Changing post-attempt review terminal outcomes that already carry concrete evidence for operator action.

PARENT/DEPS
Parent: this epic. No dependency beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestFEAT010DescribesForwardProgressPolicy asserts docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md contains a section naming open as the execution lane and proposed as the operator-decision escape, and forbids readiness downgrade of operator-promoted beads.
2. TestADR023CodifiesOperatorAcceptanceSignal asserts docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-023-bead-lifecycle-quality-policy.md documents WARN-ONLY default and the proposed->open operator-acceptance signal as durable.
3. TestFEAT010ADR023CrossLink asserts each doc references the other for the forward-progress readiness policy.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/...` green.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passing.
